<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-AU">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
<title>Home Loan Calculators</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:opsz,wght@9..144,400;9..144,500;9..144,600&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{
  --bg:#f6f4ef;
  --surface:#ffffff;
  --surface-2:#fbfaf7;
  --ink:#1b2430;
  --ink-soft:#5c6675;
  --ink-faint:#929aa6;
  --line:#e7e2d8;
  --line-strong:#d8d2c5;
  --brand:#1f7a63;
  --brand-deep:#155c4a;
  --brand-tint:#eaf3ef;
  --amber:#b9852b;
  --amber-tint:#f6efe0;
  --panel-bg:#1d3a33;
  --panel-bg2:#163029;
  --panel-ink:#eef5f2;
  --panel-soft:#9fc0b6;
  --panel-line:rgba(255,255,255,.12);
  --panel-accent:#f0c97a;
  --graph-line:#7fd9b6;
  --radius:14px;
  --radius-sm:10px;
  --shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(27,36,48,.04), 0 8px 28px rgba(27,36,48,.06);
  --font-display:'Fraunces',Georgia,serif;
  --font-ui:'Inter',system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;
}
*{box-sizing:border-box;}
[hidden]{display:none!important;}
html{-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;}
body{
  margin:0;
  background:var(--bg);
  color:var(--ink);
  font-family:var(--font-ui);
  font-size:15px;
  line-height:1.5;
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
}
.wrap{max-width:1080px;margin:0 auto;padding:28px 20px 56px;}

/* Header */
.masthead{margin-bottom:22px;}
.eyebrow{
  font-size:12px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--brand);margin:0 0 8px;
}
.masthead h1{
  font-family:var(--font-display);font-weight:500;font-size:clamp(28px,5vw,42px);
  line-height:1.05;margin:0;letter-spacing:-.01em;font-optical-sizing:auto;
}
.masthead p{color:var(--ink-soft);margin:10px 0 0;max-width:56ch;}

/* Tabs */
.tabs{
  display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px 2px;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);margin:24px 0 0;
}
.tab{
  appearance:none;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;
  font-family:var(--font-ui);font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:var(--ink-soft);
  padding:12px 14px;white-space:nowrap;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;
  margin-bottom:-1px;transition:color .15s, border-color .15s;
}
.tab:hover{color:var(--ink);}
.tab[aria-selected="true"]{color:var(--brand-deep);border-bottom-color:var(--brand);}
.tab:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--brand);outline-offset:2px;border-radius:6px;}
@media(max-width:620px){
  .tabs{border-bottom:none;gap:8px;margin-top:18px;}
  .tab{border:1px solid var(--line-strong);border-radius:999px;padding:9px 15px;margin-bottom:0;background:var(--surface);box-shadow:var(--shadow);font-weight:600;}
  .tab[aria-selected="true"]{background:var(--brand);color:#fff;border-color:var(--brand);}
  .tab:hover{color:var(--ink-soft);}
  .tab-feature{border-color:var(--amber);color:var(--amber);}
  .tab-feature[aria-selected="true"]{background:var(--amber);color:#fff;border-color:var(--amber);}
}

/* Panel layout */
.panel{display:none;margin-top:26px;}
.panel.active{display:block;animation:rise .3s ease;}
@keyframes rise{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(6px);}to{opacity:1;transform:none;}}
.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:22px;}
@media(min-width:860px){.grid{grid-template-columns:1.05fr .95fr;align-items:start;}}

.card{
  background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--radius);
  padding:22px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);
}
.card h2{
  font-family:var(--font-display);font-weight:500;font-size:20px;margin:0 0 4px;letter-spacing:-.01em;
}
.card .lede{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:13.5px;margin:0 0 18px;}

/* Inputs */
.field{margin-bottom:18px;}
.field:last-child{margin-bottom:0;}
.field > label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;gap:12px;font-weight:500;font-size:13.5px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.field > label .val{
  font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;font-weight:600;color:var(--brand-deep);
  background:var(--brand-tint);padding:3px 9px;border-radius:7px;font-size:13.5px;
}
input[type="range"]{
  -webkit-appearance:none;appearance:none;width:100%;height:6px;border-radius:6px;
  background:var(--line);outline:none;margin:2px 0;
}
input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb{
  -webkit-appearance:none;appearance:none;width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;
  background:var(--brand);border:3px solid #fff;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.2);cursor:pointer;
}
input[type="range"]::-moz-range-thumb{
  width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--brand);border:3px solid #fff;
  box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.2);cursor:pointer;
}
input[type="range"]:focus-visible::-webkit-slider-thumb{outline:2px solid var(--brand-deep);outline-offset:2px;}
.num-input,.sel-input{
  width:100%;font-family:var(--font-ui);font-size:15px;color:var(--ink);
  padding:11px 12px;border:1px solid var(--line-strong);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);
  background:var(--surface-2);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;
}
.num-input:focus,.sel-input:focus{outline:2px solid var(--brand);outline-offset:-1px;border-color:var(--brand);}
.with-prefix{position:relative;}
.with-prefix .pfx{position:absolute;left:12px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--ink-faint);font-size:15px;pointer-events:none;}
.with-prefix .num-input{padding-left:26px;}
.with-suffix{position:relative;}
.with-suffix .sfx{position:absolute;right:12px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--ink-faint);font-size:14px;pointer-events:none;}
.with-suffix .num-input{padding-right:46px;}
.field .with-prefix,.field .with-suffix{margin-bottom:9px;}
.presets{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-top:10px;}
.preset{appearance:none;border:1px solid var(--line-strong);background:var(--surface);color:var(--ink-soft);font-family:var(--font-ui);font-size:12.5px;font-weight:500;padding:5px 10px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .12s,border-color .12s,color .12s;}
.preset:hover{background:var(--brand-tint);border-color:var(--brand);color:var(--brand-deep);}
.preset:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--brand);outline-offset:1px;}
.amount-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px 10px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:9px;}
.amount-row .with-prefix{flex:0 0 132px;width:132px;margin-bottom:0;}
.amount-row .presets{margin-top:0;}

.row2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;}
.row3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:12px;}
@media(max-width:520px){.row3{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}}

/* Segmented control */
.seg{display:inline-flex;background:var(--surface-2);border:1px solid var(--line-strong);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:3px;gap:2px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.seg button{
  appearance:none;border:none;background:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font-ui);
  font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--ink-soft);padding:7px 13px;border-radius:7px;transition:.15s;
}
.seg button[aria-pressed="true"]{background:var(--brand);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.14);}
.seg button:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--brand);outline-offset:1px;}

/* Results card */
.result{position:sticky;top:18px;background:linear-gradient(170deg,var(--panel-bg) 0%,var(--panel-bg2) 100%);color:var(--panel-ink);border:none;}
.result h2{color:var(--panel-ink);}
.result .lede{color:var(--panel-soft);}
.hero{margin:8px 0 18px;}
.hero .label{font-size:12.5px;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--panel-soft);font-weight:600;}
.hero .figure{font-family:var(--font-display);font-weight:500;font-size:clamp(34px,7vw,46px);line-height:1;margin-top:6px;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;letter-spacing:-.01em;}
.hero .figure small{font-size:.45em;color:var(--panel-soft);font-family:var(--font-ui);font-weight:500;margin-left:6px;}
.breakdown{border-top:1px solid var(--panel-line);}
.breakdown .line{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;padding:11px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--panel-line);gap:16px;}
.breakdown .line:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.breakdown .line .k{color:var(--panel-soft);font-size:13.5px;}
.breakdown .line .v{font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;font-weight:600;font-size:15px;}
.breakdown .line .v.amber{color:var(--panel-accent);}

/* Mini chart */
.chartwrap{margin-top:18px;}
.chartwrap .ttl{font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--panel-soft);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:10px;}
.legend{display:flex;gap:16px;margin-top:10px;font-size:12.5px;color:var(--panel-soft);}
.legend span{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.dot{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;}
.dot.dp{background:var(--graph-line);}
.dot.di{background:var(--panel-accent);}
.dot.dsoft{background:var(--panel-soft);}

.split-bar{height:13px;border-radius:7px;overflow:hidden;display:flex;margin-top:4px;background:var(--panel-line);}
.split-bar .p{background:var(--graph-line);}
.split-bar .i{background:var(--panel-accent);}
.sd-chart{position:relative;margin-top:4px;cursor:crosshair;touch-action:none;}
.sd-chart svg{display:block;overflow:visible;}
.sd-tip{position:absolute;pointer-events:none;background:var(--panel-bg2);border:1px solid var(--panel-line);border-radius:9px;padding:9px 11px;font-size:11.5px;color:var(--panel-ink);min-width:150px;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.35);transform:translate(-50%,-100%);z-index:5;line-height:1.45;}
.sd-tip .tval{font-weight:700;font-size:12.5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:var(--panel-ink);}
.sd-tip .trow{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;}
.sd-tip .trow .tk{color:var(--panel-soft);}
.sd-tip .trow .tv{font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;font-weight:600;}
.sd-tip .trow.ttot{border-top:1px solid var(--panel-line);margin-top:4px;padding-top:4px;}

.note{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-top:16px;line-height:1.45;}
.result .note{color:var(--panel-soft);}
.callout{background:var(--amber-tint);border:1px solid #ecdcb8;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:12px 14px;font-size:13px;color:#7a5a1e;margin-top:16px;}
.pos{color:#1f7a63;}
.disclaimer{margin-top:30px;font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-faint);line-height:1.55;border-top:1px solid var(--line);padding-top:18px;}

/* comparison two-up */
.cmp-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;}
@media(max-width:560px){.cmp-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
.cmp-col h3{font-family:var(--font-ui);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--ink-soft);margin:0 0 12px;}
.cmp-result{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;text-align:center;}
.cmp-result .box{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:14px 10px;}
.cmp-result .box .lbl{font-size:11.5px;color:#9fc0b6;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;}
.cmp-result .box .big{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:24px;margin-top:6px;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.winner{margin-top:16px;text-align:center;font-size:14px;background:rgba(95,191,159,.16);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:12px;}
/* ---- lead capture (demo) ---- */
.lead-capture{margin-top:18px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);}
.lc-btn{appearance:none;border:0;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font-ui);font-weight:600;font-size:13.5px;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 16px;background:var(--graph-line);color:#0e231c;transition:filter .15s;}
.lc-btn:hover{filter:brightness(1.06);}
.lc-link{appearance:none;background:none;border:0;cursor:pointer;color:#9fc0b6;font-family:var(--font-ui);font-size:13px;text-decoration:underline;text-underline-offset:2px;padding:6px 4px;}
.lc-link:hover{color:#cfe6dd;}
.lc-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.lc-si{font-size:13px;color:#cfe6dd;}
.lc-actions{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.lc-form-h{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#cfe6dd;margin-bottom:10px;}
.lc-fields{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.3fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;}
@media(max-width:520px){.lc-fields{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
.lc-fields input{width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);color:#fff;border-radius:9px;padding:9px 11px;font-family:var(--font-ui);font-size:14px;}
.lc-fields input::placeholder{color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);}
.lc-fields input:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--graph-line);background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);}
.lc-consent{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;font-size:12.5px;color:#bcd4cb;margin:2px 0 10px;cursor:pointer;line-height:1.4;}
.lc-consent input{margin-top:1px;flex:none;}
.lc-err{color:#ffd9a8;font-size:12.5px;margin-top:6px;}
.lc-done{font-size:13.5px;color:#cfe6dd;line-height:1.5;}
.lc-demo{display:inline-block;font-size:11.5px;color:#9fc0b6;opacity:.85;}
/* ---- app features page ---- */
.tab-feature{color:var(--amber);font-weight:600;}
.tab-feature[aria-selected="true"]{color:var(--amber);border-bottom-color:var(--amber);}
.feat-wrap{max-width:1000px;margin:0 auto;padding:6px 0 16px;}
.feat-hero{text-align:center;padding:14px 0 2px;}
.feat-eyebrow,.feat-cta-eyebrow{font-family:var(--font-ui);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--brand);}
.feat-h1{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:clamp(25px,3.6vw,37px);line-height:1.12;margin:10px auto 0;max-width:20ch;color:var(--ink);}
.feat-sub{font-size:16px;line-height:1.55;color:var(--ink-soft);max-width:62ch;margin:14px auto 0;}
.feat-band{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:14px;margin:28px 0 6px;}
.feat-stat{background:var(--brand-tint);border:1px solid #d6e7e0;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:16px 12px;text-align:center;}
.fs-n{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:32px;color:var(--brand-deep);line-height:1;}
.fs-l{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-top:6px;line-height:1.35;}
.feat-sec{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:22px;margin:34px 0 14px;color:var(--ink);}
.feat-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:14px;}
.feat-grid-3{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);}
.feat-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line);border-left:3px solid var(--brand);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:17px 18px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.feat-card h4{font-family:var(--font-ui);font-size:15px;font-weight:600;margin:0 0 6px;color:var(--ink);}
.feat-card p{font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--ink-soft);margin:0;}
.feat-cta{margin:34px 0 4px;background:linear-gradient(165deg,#1d3a33,#14302a);color:#fff;border-radius:var(--radius);padding:32px 30px;text-align:center;}
.feat-cta h3{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:clamp(22px,3.4vw,30px);margin:10px 0 0;}
.feat-cta .feat-cta-eyebrow{color:#9fc0b6;}
.feat-cta p{color:#cfe0d9;font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;max-width:60ch;margin:12px auto 0;}
@media(max-width:760px){.feat-band{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}.feat-grid,.feat-grid-3{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
.feat-lead{font-size:15px;line-height:1.55;color:var(--ink-soft);max-width:64ch;margin:-2px 0 16px;}
.feat-themes{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:14px;}
@media(max-width:760px){.feat-themes{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}}
.ftheme{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow);background:var(--surface);cursor:pointer;text-align:left;appearance:none;font:inherit;width:100%;padding:0;transition:border-color .15s,box-shadow .15s,transform .08s;}
.ftheme:hover{border-color:var(--brand);box-shadow:0 5px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.10);}
.ftheme:active{transform:translateY(1px);}
.ftheme[aria-pressed="true"]{border-color:var(--brand);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px var(--brand-tint);}
.ftheme .fvibe{padding:0 14px 12px;font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-faint);line-height:1.4;}
.ftheme .fh{height:50px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 14px;}
.ftheme .fbtn{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#fff;padding:4px 9px;border-radius:6px;}
.ftheme .fdot{width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;}
.ftheme .fb{padding:11px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;}
.ftheme .fname{font-family:var(--font-ui);font-size:13.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink);}
.ftheme .fline{height:4px;width:46px;border-radius:3px;flex:none;}
.feat-steps{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;}
@media(max-width:760px){.feat-steps{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
.fstep{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:20px 18px 18px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.fstep .fnum{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--brand);color:#fff;font-family:var(--font-ui);font-weight:700;font-size:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:11px;}
.fstep h4{font-family:var(--font-ui);font-size:15px;font-weight:600;margin:0 0 6px;color:var(--ink);}
.fstep p{font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--ink-soft);margin:0;}
.feat-leadcard{margin-top:16px;background:linear-gradient(165deg,var(--panel-bg),var(--panel-bg2));border-radius:var(--radius);padding:20px 22px;}
.flc-h{font-family:var(--font-ui);font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--panel-soft);margin-bottom:8px;}
.flc-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:11px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--panel-line);}
.flc-row:first-of-type{border-top:none;}
.flc-av{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--graph-line);color:var(--panel-bg);font-weight:700;font-family:var(--font-ui);font-size:13px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex:none;}
.flc-meta{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.flc-name{font-family:var(--font-ui);font-size:13.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--panel-ink);letter-spacing:.04em;}
.flc-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--panel-soft);}
.flc-amt{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:15px;color:var(--panel-accent);font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;}
/* contact / brokers (site) */
.ct-wrap{max-width:880px;margin:0 auto;padding:6px 0 12px;}
.ct-intro{font-size:16px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.55;margin:0 0 22px;text-align:center;}
.ct-team{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:16px;}
.ct-pick{cursor:pointer;text-align:left;appearance:none;font:inherit;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:18px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:border-color .15s,box-shadow .15s;}
.ct-pick:hover{border-color:var(--brand);box-shadow:0 5px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.10);}
.ct-pick .ct-av,.bio-av{width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;background:var(--brand-tint);border:1px solid var(--line);}
.ct-pick .ct-nm{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:18px;color:var(--ink);margin:10px 0 2px;}
.ct-pick .ct-ti{font-size:13px;color:var(--brand-deep);font-weight:600;}
.ct-pick .ct-sp{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-top:8px;line-height:1.4;}
.bio{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:26px;align-items:start;}
@media(max-width:720px){.bio{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
.bio-head{display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:14px;}
.bio-nm{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:26px;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.1;}
.bio-ti{font-size:14px;color:var(--brand-deep);font-weight:600;}
.bio-body p{font-size:15px;line-height:1.6;color:var(--ink-soft);}
.bio-meta{margin-top:16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;font-size:14px;color:var(--ink);}
.bio-meta .bm{display:flex;gap:9px;align-items:flex-start;}
.bio-meta .bm b{color:var(--ink-soft);font-weight:600;min-width:64px;}
.bio-special{margin-top:14px;background:var(--brand-tint);border:1px solid #d8e8e1;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:12px 14px;font-size:13px;color:var(--brand-deep);}
.bio-back{appearance:none;background:none;border:none;color:var(--brand-deep);font:600 13px var(--font-ui);cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:16px;padding:0;}
.cform{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:22px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.cform h3{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:20px;margin:0 0 4px;color:var(--ink);}
.cform .req{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--ink-faint);margin:0 0 14px;}
.cform label{display:block;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink-soft);margin:10px 0 4px;}
.cform input,.cform textarea{width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;font-family:var(--font-ui);font-size:14px;padding:9px 11px;border:1px solid var(--line-strong);border-radius:8px;background:#fff;}
.cform textarea{resize:vertical;}
.cform .cf-btn{margin-top:14px;width:100%;appearance:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;background:var(--brand);color:#fff;font:600 14px var(--font-ui);padding:11px;border-radius:9px;}
.cform .cf-ok{margin-top:12px;color:var(--brand-deep);font-size:13.5px;font-weight:600;display:none;}
.cform .cf-err{color:#b4453a;font-size:13px;min-height:16px;margin-top:8px;}
/* landing page view */
.lpv{max-width:760px;margin:0 auto;padding:8px 0 16px;font-size:16px;line-height:1.65;color:var(--ink);}
.lpv h1{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:clamp(26px,4vw,38px);line-height:1.12;margin:0 0 16px;}
.lpv h2{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:22px;margin:26px 0 10px;color:var(--ink);}
.lpv h3{font-family:var(--font-ui);font-size:16px;font-weight:700;margin:20px 0 8px;}
.lpv p{color:var(--ink-soft);margin:0 0 14px;}
.lpv ul{color:var(--ink-soft);margin:0 0 14px;padding-left:22px;}
.lpv li{margin:4px 0;}
.lpv .lpv-cta{display:inline-block;margin-top:8px;background:var(--brand);color:#fff;text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;padding:11px 20px;border-radius:9px;}
/* site footer nav */
.site-foot{border-top:1px solid var(--line);margin-top:30px;padding-top:18px;}
.site-foot-in{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px 20px;justify-content:center;}
.site-foot a{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:13.5px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;}
.site-foot a:hover{color:var(--brand-deep);}
</style>
<script>window.BROKERAPP_CONFIG = __BROKERAPP_CONFIG__;</script>
</head>
<body>
<div class="wrap">
  <header class="masthead">
    <p class="eyebrow" id="hdr-eyebrow">Plan with confidence</p>
    <img id="hdr-logo" alt="" style="display:none;max-height:48px;margin:0 0 4px;">
    <h1 id="hdr-title">Home loan calculators</h1>
    <p id="hdr-sub">Run the numbers on repayments, borrowing power and upfront costs before you talk to a broker. Estimates update as you go.</p>
  </header>

  <div class="tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Calculators">
    <button class="tab" role="tab" id="tab-repay" aria-controls="panel-repay" aria-selected="true">Repayments</button>
    <button class="tab" role="tab" id="tab-borrow" aria-controls="panel-borrow" aria-selected="false">Borrowing power</button>
    <button class="tab" role="tab" id="tab-costs" aria-controls="panel-costs" aria-selected="false">Stamp duty & costs</button>
    <button class="tab" role="tab" id="tab-extra" aria-controls="panel-extra" aria-selected="false">Extra repayments</button>
    <button class="tab" role="tab" id="tab-offset" aria-controls="panel-offset" aria-selected="false">Offset savings</button>
    <button class="tab" role="tab" id="tab-deposit" aria-controls="panel-deposit" aria-selected="false">Deposit goal</button>
    <button class="tab" role="tab" id="tab-compare" aria-controls="panel-compare" aria-selected="false">Loan comparison</button>
    <button class="tab" role="tab" id="tab-contact" aria-controls="panel-contact" aria-selected="false" hidden>Contact</button>
    <button class="tab tab-feature" role="tab" id="tab-features" aria-controls="panel-features" aria-selected="false">★ App features</button>
  </div>

  <!-- ============ REPAYMENTS ============ -->
  <section class="panel active" id="panel-repay" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="tab-repay">
    <div class="grid">
      <div class="card">
        <h2>Loan repayments</h2>
        <p class="lede">See what your regular repayments would be and how much interest you'll pay over the life of the loan.</p>

        <div class="field">
          <label for="r-amount-num">Loan amount</label>
          <div class="amount-row">
            <div class="with-prefix"><span class="pfx">$</span><input class="num-input" type="text" inputmode="numeric" id="r-amount-num" autocomplete="off"></div>
            <div class="presets" id="r-amount-presets"></div>
          </div>
          <input type="range" id="r-amount" min="50000" max="2500000" step="10000" value="650000">
        </div>
        <div class="row2">
          <div class="field">
            <label for="r-rate-num">Interest rate</label>
            <div class="with-suffix"><input class="num-input" type="number" step="0.05" id="r-rate-num"><span class="sfx">% p.a.</span></div>
            <input type="range" id="r-rate" min="1" max="12" step="0.05" value="6.1">
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="r-term-num">Loan term</label>
            <div class="with-suffix"><input class="num-input" type="number" step="1" id="r-term-num"><span class="sfx">years</span></div>
            <input type="range" id="r-term" min="1" max="35" step="1" value="30">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Repayment frequency</label>
          <div class="seg" id="r-freq" role="group" aria-label="Repayment frequency">
            <button data-v="12" aria-pressed="true">Monthly</button>
            <button data-v="26" aria-pressed="false">Fortnightly</button>
            <button data-v="52" aria-pressed="false">Weekly</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Repayment type</label>
          <div class="seg" id="r-type" role="group" aria-label="Repayment type">
            <button data-v="pi" aria-pressed="true">Principal & interest</button>
            <button data-v="io" aria-pressed="false">Interest only</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card result">
        <h2>Your repayments</h2>
        <p class="lede">Estimated, based on a constant interest rate.</p>
        <div class="hero">
          <div class="label" id="r-hero-label">Monthly repayment</div>
          <div class="figure" id="r-hero">$0</div>
        </div>
        <div class="breakdown">
          <div class="line"><span class="k">Total repaid over term</span><span class="v" id="r-total">$0</span></div>
          <div class="line"><span class="k">Total interest</span><span class="v amber" id="r-interest">$0</span></div>
          <div class="line"><span class="k">Principal</span><span class="v" id="r-principal">$0</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="chartwrap" id="r-chartwrap">
          <div class="ttl">Principal vs interest</div>
          <div class="split-bar"><div class="p" id="r-bar-p"></div><div class="i" id="r-bar-i"></div></div>
          <div class="legend">
            <span><i class="dot dp"></i>Principal</span>
            <span><i class="dot di"></i>Interest</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="chartwrap">
          <div class="ttl">Loan balance over time</div>
          <div class="sd-chart" id="r-chart">
            <svg id="r-curve" viewBox="0 0 320 140" width="100%" height="140" preserveAspectRatio="none" role="img" aria-label="Loan balance over time"></svg>
            <div class="sd-tip" id="r-tip" hidden></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ============ BORROWING POWER ============ -->
  <section class="panel" id="panel-borrow" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="tab-borrow" hidden>
    <div class="grid">
      <div class="card">
        <h2>How much can I borrow?</h2>
        <p class="lede">An indicative serviceability estimate using post-tax income and HEM-style living costs that rise with income. Assessed at the actual rate.</p>

        <div class="field">
          <label>Applicants</label>
          <div class="seg" id="b-apps" role="group" aria-label="Applicants">
            <button data-v="1" aria-pressed="true">Single</button>
            <button data-v="2" aria-pressed="false">Joint</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="b-inc1">Gross annual income (applicant 1)</label>
          <div class="with-prefix"><span class="pfx">$</span><input class="num-input" type="number" id="b-inc1" value="95000" min="0" step="1000"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="field" id="b-inc2-field" hidden>
          <label for="b-inc2">Gross annual income (applicant 2)</label>
          <div class="with-prefix"><span class="pfx">$</span><input class="num-input" type="number" id="b-inc2" value="70000" min="0" step="1000"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="row2">
          <div class="field">
            <label for="b-deps">Dependents</label>
            <input class="num-input" type="number" id="b-deps" value="0" min="0" max="10" step="1">
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="b-expenses">Monthly living expenses</label>
            <div class="with-prefix"><span class="pfx">$</span><input class="num-input" type="number" id="b-expenses" value="0" min="0" step="100"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row2">
          <div class="field">
            <label for="b-debts">Other monthly debt repayments</label>
            <div class="with-prefix"><span class="pfx">$</span><input class="num-input" type="number" id="b-debts" value="0" min="0" step="50"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="b-cards">Total credit card limits</label>
            <div class="with-prefix"><span class="pfx">$</span><input class="num-input" type="number" id="b-cards" value="0" min="0" step="500"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="row2">
          <div class="field">
            <label for="b-rate-num">Interest rate</label>
            <div class="with-suffix"><input class="num-input" type="number" step="0.05" id="b-rate-num"><span class="sfx">% p.a.</span></div>
            <input type="range" id="b-rate" min="3" max="10" step="0.05" value="6.1">
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="b-term-num">Loan term</label>
            <div class="with-suffix"><input class="num-input" type="number" step="1" id="b-term-num"><span class="sfx">years</span></div>
            <input type="range" id="b-term" min="10" max="30" step="1" value="30">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card result">
        <h2>Estimated borrowing power</h2>
        <p class="lede">A guide only — lenders assess differently.</p>
        <div class="hero">
          <div class="label">You could borrow up to</div>
          <div class="figure" id="b-hero">$0</div>
        </div>
        <div class="breakdown">
          <div class="line"><span class="k">Estimated net monthly income</span><span class="v" id="b-net">$0</span></div>
          <div class="line"><span class="k">Monthly surplus for a loan</span><span class="v" id="b-surplus">$0</span></div>
          <div class="line"><span class="k" id="b-assess-label">Assessed at</span><span class="v" id="b-assess">0%</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="callout" id="b-callout">Lenders apply a serviceability buffer (around 3%) on top of the actual rate, so your assessed repayment is higher than what you'd really pay.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ============ STAMP DUTY ============ -->
  <section class="panel" id="panel-costs" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="tab-costs" hidden>
    <div class="grid">
      <div class="card">
        <h2>Stamp duty & government charges</h2>
        <p class="lede">Estimate the transfer duty, registration fees and grants that apply to your purchase.</p>

        <div class="field">
          <label>Property purpose</label>
          <div class="seg" id="c-buyer" role="group" aria-label="Property purpose">
            <button data-v="owner" aria-pressed="true">Owner-occupier</button>
            <button data-v="investor" aria-pressed="false">Investment</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="c-price">Property value <span class="val" id="c-price-v"></span></label>
          <input type="range" id="c-price" min="100000" max="3000000" step="5000" value="750000">
          <div class="with-prefix" style="margin-top:10px"><span class="pfx">$</span><input class="num-input" type="text" inputmode="numeric" id="c-price-num" value="750,000" autocomplete="off"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="row2">
          <div class="field">
            <label for="c-state">State / territory</label>
            <select class="sel-input" id="c-state">
              <option value="NSW">New South Wales</option>
              <option value="VIC">Victoria</option>
              <option value="QLD">Queensland</option>
              <option value="ACT" selected>Australian Capital Territory</option>
              <option value="WA">Western Australia</option>
              <option value="SA">South Australia</option>
              <option value="TAS">Tasmania</option>
              <option value="NT">Northern Territory</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="c-type">Property type</label>
            <select class="sel-input" id="c-type">
              <option value="established">Established home</option>
              <option value="new">New home</option>
              <option value="vacant">Vacant land</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Are you a first home buyer?</label>
          <div class="seg" id="c-fhb" role="group" aria-label="First home buyer">
            <button data-v="yes" aria-pressed="true">Yes</button>
            <button data-v="no" aria-pressed="false">No</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Are you a foreign buyer?</label>
          <div class="seg" id="c-foreign" role="group" aria-label="Foreign buyer">
            <button data-v="no" aria-pressed="true">No</button>
            <button data-v="yes" aria-pressed="false">Yes</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card result">
        <h2>Government charges</h2>
        <p class="lede" id="c-sub">Estimate based on 2025–26 rates.</p>
        <div class="hero">
          <div class="label">Total government charges</div>
          <div class="figure" id="c-hero">$0</div>
        </div>
        <div class="breakdown">
          <div class="line"><span class="k">Base stamp duty</span><span class="v" id="c-base">$0</span></div>
          <div class="line" id="c-conc-row"><span class="k">Stamp duty concession</span><span class="v pos" id="c-conc">$0</span></div>
          <div class="line" id="c-surch-row" hidden><span class="k">Foreign buyer surcharge</span><span class="v amber" id="c-surch">$0</span></div>
          <div class="line"><span class="k">Stamp duty payable</span><span class="v amber" id="c-payable">$0</span></div>
          <div class="line"><span class="k">Mortgage registration</span><span class="v" id="c-mortreg">$0</span></div>
          <div class="line"><span class="k">Transfer fee</span><span class="v" id="c-transfer">$0</span></div>
          <div class="line" id="c-grant-row"><span class="k">Government grant (FHOG) <span style="opacity:.6">— benefit received</span></span><span class="v pos" id="c-grant">$0</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="chartwrap" id="c-chartwrap">
          <div class="ttl">Government charges across property value</div>
          <div class="sd-chart" id="sd-chart">
            <svg id="sd-svg" viewBox="0 0 340 168" width="100%" height="168" preserveAspectRatio="none" role="img" aria-label="Government charges by property value"></svg>
            <div class="sd-tip" id="sd-tip" hidden></div>
          </div>
          <div class="legend" id="sd-legend">
            <span><i class="dot dp"></i>Your scenario</span>
            <span id="sd-legend-std" hidden><i class="dot dsoft" style="opacity:.7"></i>Without first-home benefit</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="callout" id="c-fhbnote" hidden></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ============ EXTRA REPAYMENTS ============ -->
  <section class="panel" id="panel-extra" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="tab-extra" hidden>
    <div class="grid">
      <div class="card">
        <h2>Extra repayments</h2>
        <p class="lede">See how paying a little extra each month, fortnight or week shortens your loan and cuts the interest you pay.</p>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="e-amount-num">Loan amount</label>
          <div class="amount-row">
            <div class="with-prefix"><span class="pfx">$</span><input class="num-input" type="text" inputmode="numeric" id="e-amount-num" autocomplete="off"></div>
            <div class="presets" id="e-amount-presets"></div>
          </div>
          <input type="range" id="e-amount" min="50000" max="2500000" step="10000" value="650000">
        </div>
        <div class="row2">
          <div class="field">
            <label for="e-rate-num">Interest rate</label>
            <div class="with-suffix"><input class="num-input" type="number" step="0.05" id="e-rate-num"><span class="sfx">% p.a.</span></div>
            <input type="range" id="e-rate" min="1" max="12" step="0.05" value="6.1">
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="e-term-num">Loan term</label>
            <div class="with-suffix"><input class="num-input" type="number" step="1" id="e-term-num"><span class="sfx">years</span></div>
            <input type="range" id="e-term" min="1" max="35" step="1" value="30">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>How often you'll pay the extra</label>
          <div class="seg" id="e-freq" role="group" aria-label="Extra repayment frequency">
            <button data-v="12" aria-pressed="true">Monthly</button>
            <button data-v="26" aria-pressed="false">Fortnightly</button>
            <button data-v="52" aria-pressed="false">Weekly</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="e-extra-num" id="e-extra-label">Extra per month</label>
          <div class="amount-row">
            <div class="with-prefix"><span class="pfx">$</span><input class="num-input" type="text" inputmode="numeric" id="e-extra-num" autocomplete="off"></div>
            <div class="presets" id="e-extra-presets"></div>
          </div>
          <input type="range" id="e-extra" min="0" max="2000" step="25" value="300">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card result">
        <h2>What you'd save</h2>
        <p class="lede">Compared with the minimum repayment.</p>
        <div class="hero">
          <div class="label">Interest saved</div>
          <div class="figure pos" id="e-hero" style="color:#7fd9b6">$0</div>
        </div>
        <div class="breakdown">
          <div class="line"><span class="k">Time saved</span><span class="v" id="e-time">—</span></div>
          <div class="line"><span class="k">New loan term</span><span class="v" id="e-newterm">—</span></div>
          <div class="line"><span class="k" id="e-min-label">Minimum repayment</span><span class="v" id="e-min">$0</span></div>
          <div class="line"><span class="k" id="e-new-label">New repayment</span><span class="v" id="e-new">$0</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="chartwrap">
          <div class="ttl">Loan balance — with vs without the extra</div>
          <div class="sd-chart" id="e-chart">
            <svg id="e-curve" viewBox="0 0 320 140" width="100%" height="140" preserveAspectRatio="none" role="img" aria-label="Loan balance with versus without extra repayments"></svg>
            <div class="sd-tip" id="e-tip" hidden></div>
          </div>
          <div class="legend">
            <span><i class="dot dp"></i>With extra</span>
            <span><i class="dot dsoft" style="opacity:.75"></i>Minimum only</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ============ OFFSET ============ -->
  <section class="panel" id="panel-offset" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="tab-offset" hidden>
    <div class="grid">
      <div class="card">
        <h2>Offset account savings</h2>
        <p class="lede">Money in an offset account reduces the balance you're charged interest on. See the impact over your loan.</p>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="o-amount-num">Loan amount</label>
          <div class="amount-row">
            <div class="with-prefix"><span class="pfx">$</span><input class="num-input" type="text" inputmode="numeric" id="o-amount-num" autocomplete="off"></div>
            <div class="presets" id="o-amount-presets"></div>
          </div>
          <input type="range" id="o-amount" min="50000" max="2500000" step="10000" value="650000">
        </div>
        <div class="row2">
          <div class="field">
            <label for="o-rate-num">Interest rate</label>
            <div class="with-suffix"><input class="num-input" type="number" step="0.05" id="o-rate-num"><span class="sfx">% p.a.</span></div>
            <input type="range" id="o-rate" min="1" max="12" step="0.05" value="6.1">
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="o-term-num">Loan term</label>
            <div class="with-suffix"><input class="num-input" type="number" step="1" id="o-term-num"><span class="sfx">years</span></div>
            <input type="range" id="o-term" min="1" max="35" step="1" value="30">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="o-balance-num">Offset balance</label>
          <div class="amount-row">
            <div class="with-prefix"><span class="pfx">$</span><input class="num-input" type="text" inputmode="numeric" id="o-balance-num" autocomplete="off"></div>
            <div class="presets" id="o-balance-presets"></div>
          </div>
          <input type="range" id="o-balance" min="0" max="300000" step="2500" value="40000">
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="o-monthly-num">Added to offset each month</label>
          <div class="amount-row">
            <div class="with-prefix"><span class="pfx">$</span><input class="num-input" type="text" inputmode="numeric" id="o-monthly-num" autocomplete="off"></div>
            <div class="presets" id="o-monthly-presets"></div>
          </div>
          <input type="range" id="o-monthly" min="0" max="3000" step="50" value="0">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card result">
        <h2>Your offset benefit</h2>
        <p class="lede">Assumes minimum repayments stay the same.</p>
        <div class="hero">
          <div class="label">Interest saved</div>
          <div class="figure" id="o-hero" style="color:#7fd9b6">$0</div>
        </div>
        <div class="breakdown">

  /* ================= BORROWING POWER =================

  // active rate set (may be replaced by hosted rates.json — see loadRates)
  let RATES = DEFAULT_RATES;
  const capOf = x => (x===null || x===undefined) ? Infinity : x;

  function bracket(tbl, price){
    let d = 0;
    for(let i=tbl.length-1; i>=0; i--){
      if(price > tbl[i].s){ d = tbl[i].b + (price - tbl[i].s)*tbl[i].r; break; }
    }
    return d;
  }

  function dutyFor(cfg, price, purpose){
    if(cfg.model==='act'){
      if(price > cfg.flatAbove.threshold) return price*cfg.flatAbove.rate;
      return bracket(purpose==='owner' ? cfg.owner : cfg.general, price);
    }
    if(cfg.model==='vic'){
      if(price < cfg.flatBand.from) return bracket(cfg.brackets, price);
      if(price <= cfg.flatBand.to) return price*cfg.flatBand.rate;
      return cfg.top.base + (price - cfg.top.threshold)*cfg.top.rate;
    }
    if(cfg.model==='nt'){
      if(price <= cfg.curve.capValue){ const V=price/1000; return cfg.curve.k*V*V + cfg.curve.lin*V; }
      for(const t of cfg.tiers){ if(price <= capOf(t.to)) return price*t.rate; }
      return price*cfg.tiers[cfg.tiers.length-1].rate;
    }
    // model 'brackets'
    if(cfg.premium && price > cfg.premium.threshold) return cfg.premium.base + (price - cfg.premium.threshold)*cfg.premium.rate;
    let d = bracket(cfg.brackets, price);
    if(cfg.min && price>0) d = Math.max(cfg.min, d);
    return d;
  }

  function concessionFor(cfg, price, type, base){
    const f = cfg.fhb || {};
    switch(f.model){
      case 'act_hbcs':
        if(price<=f.noDutyUpTo) return {amount:base, note:'ACT Home Buyer Concession Scheme: eligible buyers (household income \u2264 $250,000, no property in the last 5 years) pay no duty up to '+fmt(f.noDutyUpTo)+'. Income-tested.'};
        return {amount:Math.min(f.partialCap, base), note:'ACT HBCS partial concession above '+fmt(f.noDutyUpTo)+', capped at '+fmt(f.partialCap)+'. Income-tested.'};
      case 'nsw':
        if(type==='vacant'){
          if(price<=f.landExempt) return {amount:base, note:'NSW: first home buyers pay no duty on vacant land up to '+fmt(f.landExempt)+'.'};
          if(price<=f.landConcessionTo) return {amount:base*(f.landConcessionTo-price)/(f.landConcessionTo-f.landExempt), note:'NSW vacant-land concession between '+fmt(f.landExempt)+' and '+fmt(f.landConcessionTo)+'.'};
          return {amount:0,note:null};
        }
        if(price<=f.homeExempt) return {amount:base, note:'NSW: first home buyers pay no transfer duty on homes up to '+fmt(f.homeExempt)+'.'};
        if(price<=f.homeConcessionTo) return {amount:base*(f.homeConcessionTo-price)/(f.homeConcessionTo-f.homeExempt), note:'NSW concessional duty between '+fmt(f.homeExempt)+' and '+fmt(f.homeConcessionTo)+'.'};
        return {amount:0,note:null};
      case 'vic':
        if(price<=f.exemptUpTo) return {amount:base, note:'VIC: first home buyers pay no duty up to '+fmt(f.exemptUpTo)+' (principal place of residence).'};
        if(price<=f.concessionTo) return {amount:base*(f.concessionTo-price)/(f.concessionTo-f.exemptUpTo), note:'VIC first-home concession between '+fmt(f.exemptUpTo)+' and '+fmt(f.concessionTo)+'.'};
        return {amount:0,note:null};
      case 'qld':
        if(type==='new' && f.newFullExempt) return {amount:base, note:'QLD: eligible first home buyers pay no transfer duty on new homes (from 1 May 2025).'};
        if(price<=f.establishedFull) return {amount:base, note:'QLD first home concession: full concession on established homes up to '+fmt(f.establishedFull)+'.'};
        if(price<=f.establishedTo) return {amount:base*(f.establishedTo-price)/(f.establishedTo-f.establishedFull), note:'QLD first home concession phases out between '+fmt(f.establishedFull)+' and '+fmt(f.establishedTo)+'.'};
        return {amount:0,note:null};
      case 'wa':
        if(price<=f.exemptUpTo) return {amount:base, note:'WA: no duty for first home buyers up to '+fmt(f.exemptUpTo)+' (metro). Verify region thresholds.'};
        if(price<=f.concessionTo) return {amount:base*(f.concessionTo-price)/(f.concessionTo-f.exemptUpTo), note:'WA first-home concession between '+fmt(f.exemptUpTo)+' and '+fmt(f.concessionTo)+' (metro, approx).'};
        return {amount:0,note:null};
      case 'sa':
        if(type==='new' && f.newFullExempt) return {amount:base, note:'SA: no stamp duty for first home buyers on new homes (no value cap, from June 2024).'};
        return {amount:0, note:'SA offers no first-home duty concession on established homes.'};
      case 'tas':
        if(price<=f.establishedExemptUpTo) return {amount:base, note:'TAS: first home buyers of established homes up to '+fmt(f.establishedExemptUpTo)+' pay no duty (scheme to mid-2026 \u2014 verify).'};
        return {amount:0,note:null};
      case 'nt':
        return {amount:0, note:'NT: first home support is provided via grants (HomeGrown Territory / FreshStart) rather than a duty concession.'};
      default:
        return {amount:0, note:null};
    }
  }

  function feesFor(cfg, price){
    const mr = typeof cfg.fees.mortgageReg==='number' ? cfg.fees.mortgageReg : 0;
    const t = cfg.fees.transfer;
    let tf;
    if(typeof t==='number') tf = t;
    else if(t && t.type==='vic') tf = Math.min(t.cap, t.base + Math.floor(price/1000)*t.per1000);
    else if(t && t.type==='qld') tf = t.base + Math.ceil(Math.max(0, price-t.from)/t.step)*t.per;
    else if(t && t.type==='sa'){ if(price<=5000) tf=198; else if(price<=20000) tf=221; else if(price<=40000) tf=243; else if(price<=50000) tf=342; else tf=444+(Math.ceil(price/(t.step||10000))-6)*(t.per||102); }
    else if(t && t.type==='wa'){ if(price<=85000) tf=216.60; else if(price<=120000) tf=226.60; else tf=(t.base||246.60)+Math.max(0,Math.ceil(price/(t.step||100000))-2)*(t.per||20); }
    else tf = 0;
    return {mr, tf};
  }

  // back-compat helper used by the deposit-goal calculator
  function stampDuty(state, price){ return dutyFor(RATES.states[state], price, 'owner'); }

  (function(){
    let buyer='owner', fhb='yes', foreign='no';
    seg('c-buyer', v=>{buyer=v; update();});
    seg('c-fhb', v=>{fhb=v; update();});
    seg('c-foreign', v=>{foreign=v; update();});

    const slider=$('c-price'), numInput=$('c-price-num');
    const priceVal = () => +numInput.value.replace(/[^0-9]/g,'') || 0;
    slider.addEventListener('input', ()=>{ numInput.value=(+slider.value).toLocaleString('en-AU'); update(); });
    numInput.addEventListener('input', ()=>{
      const raw=numInput.value, sel=numInput.selectionStart;
      const digitsBefore=(raw.slice(0,sel).match(/\d/g)||[]).length;
      const digits=raw.replace(/[^0-9]/g,'');
      const formatted = digits==='' ? '' : (+digits).toLocaleString('en-AU');
      numInput.value=formatted;
      // restore caret after the same number of digits
      let pos=0, seen=0;
      while(pos<formatted.length && seen<digitsBefore){ if(/\d/.test(formatted[pos])) seen++; pos++; }
      try{ numInput.setSelectionRange(pos,pos); }catch(e){}
      const v=+digits||0;
      if(v>=+slider.min && v<=+slider.max) slider.value=v;
      update();
    });
    $('c-state').addEventListener('change', update);
    $('c-type').addEventListener('change', update);

    // cents only when present
    function fmt2(n){ const r=Math.round(n*100)/100; return '$'+r.toLocaleString('en-AU',{minimumFractionDigits:(r%1===0?0:2),maximumFractionDigits:2}); }
    function fmtK(v){ return v>=1e6 ? '$'+(v/1e6).toFixed(v%1e6?1:0)+'M' : '$'+Math.round(v/1000)+'k'; }

    // single source of truth for a scenario at a given price
    function computeCharges(price, applyFHBoverride){
      const state=$('c-state').value, type=$('c-type').value, cfg=RATES.states[state];
      const fhbOn = (applyFHBoverride===undefined) ? (fhb==='yes' && buyer==='owner') : applyFHBoverride;
      const base = dutyFor(cfg, price, buyer);
      let conc={amount:0,note:null};
      if(fhbOn) conc = concessionFor(cfg, price, type, base);
      conc.amount = Math.min(conc.amount, base);
      const surcharge = (foreign==='yes') ? price*(cfg.foreign||0) : 0;
      const payable = Math.max(0, base - conc.amount) + surcharge;
      const {mr, tf} = feesFor(cfg, price);
      let grant=0; const g=cfg.fhog;
      if(fhbOn && type==='new' && g.amount>0 && price<=capOf(g.cap)) grant=g.amount;
      // total government charges = duty payable + registration + transfer (grant is a separate benefit)
      const total = payable + mr + tf;
      return {state,type,cfg,base,conc,surcharge,payable,mr,tf,grant,total};
    }

    function update(){
      const price = priceVal();
      $('c-price-v').textContent = fmt(price);
      const r = computeCharges(price);
      const isFHB = fhb==='yes' && buyer==='owner';

      $('c-base').textContent = fmt(r.base);
      $('c-conc').textContent = r.conc.amount>0 ? '\u2212 '+fmt(r.conc.amount) : '$0';
      const surRow=$('c-surch-row');
      if(r.surcharge>0){ surRow.hidden=false; $('c-surch').textContent='+ '+fmt(r.surcharge); } else surRow.hidden=true;
      $('c-payable').textContent = fmt(r.payable);
      $('c-mortreg').textContent = fmt2(r.mr);
      $('c-transfer').textContent = fmt2(r.tf);
      $('c-grant').textContent = r.grant>0 ? fmt2(r.grant) : '$0';
      $('c-hero').textContent = fmt2(r.total);

      $('c-sub').textContent = (r.cfg.validated
        ? 'Based on official '+r.state+' rates for '+RATES.effective+'.'
        : 'Based on '+RATES.effective+' '+r.state+' rates \u2014 verify before relying on it.');

      const cn=$('c-fhbnote');
      if(isFHB && r.conc.note){ cn.hidden=false; cn.textContent=r.conc.note; }
      else if(fhb==='yes' && buyer==='investor'){ cn.hidden=false; cn.textContent='First-home concessions apply to owner-occupiers only.'; }
      else cn.hidden=true;

      const eff=$('rates-effective'); if(eff) eff.textContent = RATES.effective + ' (updated '+RATES.updated+')';

      drawChart(price);
    }

    /* ---------- interactive government-charges chart ---------- */
    const SVG_W=340, SVG_H=168, PADL=6, PADR=10, PADT=12, PADB=22;
    const PLOTW=SVG_W-PADL-PADR, PLOTH=SVG_H-PADT-PADB;
    let chart=null; // {lo,hi,yMax,showStd}

    function drawChart(price){
      const svg=$('sd-svg');
      const half=450000;
      let lo=Math.max(50000, price-half), hi=price+half;
      lo=Math.floor(lo/25000)*25000; hi=Math.ceil(hi/25000)*25000;
      if(hi<=lo) hi=lo+100000;
      const isFHB = fhb==='yes' && buyer==='owner';
      const N=64; const main=[], std=[];
      let yMax=0;
      for(let i=0;i<=N;i++){
        const v=lo+(hi-lo)*i/N;
        const t=computeCharges(v).total; main.push(t); if(t>yMax)yMax=t;
        if(isFHB){ const s=computeCharges(v,false).total; std.push(s); if(s>yMax)yMax=s; }
      }
      yMax = yMax<=0 ? 1000 : yMax*1.12;
      const showStd = isFHB && std.some((s,i)=>Math.abs(s-main[i])>1);
      chart={lo,hi,yMax,showStd};

      const X=v=>PADL+(v-lo)/(hi-lo)*PLOTW;
      const Y=t=>PADT+PLOTH-(t/yMax)*PLOTH;
      const pathOf=arr=>arr.map((t,i)=>{const v=lo+(hi-lo)*i/N;return (i?'L':'M')+X(v).toFixed(1)+' '+Y(t).toFixed(1);}).join(' ');
      const mainPath=pathOf(main);
      const area=mainPath+' L'+X(hi).toFixed(1)+' '+(PADT+PLOTH)+' L'+X(lo).toFixed(1)+' '+(PADT+PLOTH)+' Z';

      // gridlines + y labels
      let grid='';
      for(let g=0;g<=3;g++){
        const val=yMax*g/3, y=Y(val);
        grid+='<line x1="'+PADL+'" y1="'+y.toFixed(1)+'" x2="'+(PADL+PLOTW)+'" y2="'+y.toFixed(1)+'" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.10)" stroke-width="1"/>';
        grid+='<text x="'+PADL+'" y="'+(y-3).toFixed(1)+'" fill="#7f9e94" font-size="8" font-family="Inter,sans-serif">'+fmtK(val)+'</text>';
      }
      // x labels
      let xl='';
      [lo,(lo+hi)/2,hi].forEach((v,i)=>{
        const anchor=i===0?'start':i===2?'end':'middle';
        xl+='<text x="'+X(v).toFixed(1)+'" y="'+(SVG_H-7)+'" fill="#7f9e94" font-size="8" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" text-anchor="'+anchor+'">'+fmtK(v)+'</text>';
      });
      // your-value marker
      const t0=computeCharges(price).total, mx=X(price), my=Y(t0);
      const marker='<line x1="'+mx.toFixed(1)+'" y1="'+PADT+'" x2="'+mx.toFixed(1)+'" y2="'+(PADT+PLOTH)+'" stroke="#cfe6dd" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/>'+
        '<circle cx="'+mx.toFixed(1)+'" cy="'+my.toFixed(1)+'" r="4" fill="#7fd9b6" stroke="#0f211c" stroke-width="1.5"/>';

      $('sd-legend-std').hidden=!showStd;

      svg.innerHTML=window.__themeSVG(
        '<defs><linearGradient id="sdg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">'+
        '<stop offset="0" stop-color="#5fbf9f" stop-opacity="0.30"/>'+
        '<stop offset="1" stop-color="#5fbf9f" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs>'+
        grid+
        '<path d="'+area+'" fill="url(#sdg)"/>'+
        (showStd?'<path d="'+pathOf(std)+'" fill="none" stroke="#9fc0b6" stroke-opacity="0.55" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4 3"/>':'')+
        '<path d="'+mainPath+'" fill="none" stroke="#7fd9b6" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round"/>'+
        marker+ xl+
        '<g id="sd-hover" style="display:none"><line id="sd-hx" stroke="#fff" stroke-opacity=".45" stroke-width="1"/><circle id="sd-hd" r="3.5" fill="#fff"/></g>');
    }

    // hover interaction
    (function(){
      const wrap=$('sd-chart'), svg=$('sd-svg'), tip=$('sd-tip');
      function at(clientX){
        if(!chart) return;
        const rect=svg.getBoundingClientRect();
        const sx=rect.width/SVG_W, sy=rect.height/SVG_H;
        let vbx=(clientX-rect.left)/sx;
        vbx=Math.max(PADL, Math.min(PADL+PLOTW, vbx));
        const value=chart.lo+(vbx-PADL)/PLOTW*(chart.hi-chart.lo);
        const r=computeCharges(value);
        const X=PADL+(value-chart.lo)/(chart.hi-chart.lo)*PLOTW;
        const Y=PADT+PLOTH-(r.total/chart.yMax)*PLOTH;
        const hv=$('sd-hover');
        if(hv){ hv.style.display='block';
          $('sd-hx').setAttribute('x1',X);$('sd-hx').setAttribute('x2',X);$('sd-hx').setAttribute('y1',PADT);$('sd-hx').setAttribute('y2',PADT+PLOTH);
          $('sd-hd').setAttribute('cx',X);$('sd-hd').setAttribute('cy',Y);
        }
        tip.hidden=false;
        tip.innerHTML='<div class="tval">'+fmt(value)+'</div>'+
          '<div class="trow"><span class="tk">Stamp duty payable</span><span class="tv">'+fmt(r.payable)+'</span></div>'+
          (r.grant>0?'<div class="trow"><span class="tk">Grant (FHOG)</span><span class="tv" style="color:#7fd9b6">'+fmt2(r.grant)+'</span></div>':'')+
          '<div class="trow"><span class="tk">Fees</span><span class="tv">'+fmt2(r.mr+r.tf)+'</span></div>'+
          '<div class="trow ttot"><span class="tk">Gov. charges</span><span class="tv">'+fmt2(r.total)+'</span></div>';
        let left=X*sx, top=Y*sy;
        const tw=tip.offsetWidth;
        left=Math.max(tw/2+2, Math.min(rect.width-tw/2-2, left));
        tip.style.left=left+'px'; tip.style.top=(top-10)+'px';
      }
      wrap.addEventListener('mousemove', e=>at(e.clientX));
      wrap.addEventListener('mouseleave', ()=>{ tip.hidden=true; const hv=$('sd-hover'); if(hv) hv.style.display='none'; });
      wrap.addEventListener('touchstart', e=>{ if(e.touches[0]) at(e.touches[0].clientX); }, {passive:true});
      wrap.addEventListener('touchmove', e=>{ if(e.touches[0]) at(e.touches[0].clientX); }, {passive:true});
    })();

    window.__stampUpdate = update;
    update();
    (window.__lrUpd=window.__lrUpd||[]).push(update);

    // optionally load hosted rates (overrides the built-in defaults)
    function applyRates(r){ if(r && r.states){ RATES = r; update(); } applyVisibleCalcs(r&&r.calculators); if(window.__applyAppearance) window.__applyAppearance(r&&r.appearance); if(window.__applyConfig) window.__applyConfig(r); }
    if(window.BROKERAPP_RATES) applyRates(window.BROKERAPP_RATES);
    else if(RATES_URL){
      fetch(RATES_URL).then(res=>res.ok?res.json():null).then(applyRates).catch(()=>{});
    }
  })();

  /* ================= EXTRA REPAYMENTS ================= */
  (function(){
    const freqWord={12:'month',26:'fortnight',52:'week'};
    const freqAdj={12:'monthly',26:'fortnightly',52:'weekly'};
    let freq=12;
    const getFreq=seg('e-freq', v=>{freq=+v; update();});
    const getAmount = linkMoney('e-amount','e-amount-num',()=>update());
    const getRate   = linkNum('e-rate','e-rate-num',()=>update());

  /* ================= DEPOSIT GOAL ================= */
  (function(){
    let incCosts='no';
    seg('d-costs', v=>{incCosts=v;update();});
    const getPrice = linkMoney('d-price','d-price-num',()=>update());
    const getPct   = linkNum('d-pct','d-pct-num',()=>update());
    const getSrate = linkNum('d-srate','d-srate-num',()=>update());
    function update(){
      const price=getPrice(), depPct=getPct();
      const savings=+$('d-savings').value||0, monthly=+$('d-monthly').value||0;
      const srate=getSrate();
      let need = price*depPct/100;
      let costNote=null;
      if(incCosts==='yes'){
        const duty = stampDuty('NSW', price);
        const extras = duty + 175 + 165 + 1800;
        need += extras;
        costNote='Goal includes an estimated NSW stamp duty plus ~'+fmt(2140)+' in fees and conveyancing.';
      }
      const gap = Math.max(0, need - savings);
      const r = srate/100/12;
      // solve months: FV = savings*(1+r)^m + monthly*[((1+r)^m -1)/r] = need
      let months;
      if(gap<=0){ months=0; }
      else if(monthly<=0 && r<=0){ months=Infinity; }
      else {
        months=0; let bal=savings; const cap=1200;
        while(bal<need && months<cap){ bal = bal*(1+r) + monthly; months++; }
        if(months>=cap) months=Infinity;
      }
      const contributions = isFinite(months)? monthly*months : 0;
      const earned = isFinite(months)? Math.max(0, (savings+contributions) - 0 - (savings+contributions) + (need>savings? (need - savings - contributions):0)) : 0;
      // simpler: interest earned = endBalance - savings - contributions, end≈need
      const interestEarned = isFinite(months)? Math.max(0, need - savings - contributions) : 0;
      $('d-hero').textContent = gap<=0 ? 'Goal reached' : termText(months);
      $('d-need').textContent=fmt(need);
      $('d-gap').textContent=fmt(gap);
      $('d-earned').textContent=fmt(interestEarned);
      const cn=$('d-callout');
      if(costNote){cn.hidden=false;cn.textContent=costNote;} else {cn.hidden=true;}
    }
    ['d-savings','d-monthly'].forEach(id=>$(id).addEventListener('input',update));
    update();
    (window.__lrUpd=window.__lrUpd||[]).push(update);
  })();

  (function(){
    function calc(amt, rate, term, fee){
      const r=rate/100/12, n=term*12;
      const pm=payment(amt,r,n);
      const totalRepay=pm*n;
      const totalFees=fee*term;
      return {pm, total: totalRepay+totalFees};
    }
    function update(){
      const a=calc(gAamt(),+$('cmp-a-rate').value,+$('cmp-a-term').value,gAfee());
      const b=calc(gBamt(),+$('cmp-b-rate').value,+$('cmp-b-term').value,gBfee());

      $('cmp-b-pm').textContent=fmt(b.pm);
      $('cmp-a-tot').textContent=fmt(a.total);
      $('cmp-b-tot').textContent=fmt(b.total);
      const diff=Math.abs(a.total-b.total);
      const w=$('cmp-winner');
      if(Math.round(diff)===0){ w.textContent='Both loans cost about the same overall.'; }
      else if(a.total<b.total){ w.innerHTML='<strong>Loan A</strong> is cheaper overall by <strong>'+fmt(diff)+'</strong>.'; }
      else { w.innerHTML='<strong>Loan B</strong> is cheaper overall by <strong>'+fmt(diff)+'</strong>.'; }
    }
