  function mny(v){ const n=Number(String(v==null?'':v).replace(/[^0-9.]/g,''))||0; return '$'+n.toLocaleString('en-AU'); }
  const INPUTS={
    repay:()=>[['Loan amount',mny(fv('r-amount-num'))],['Interest rate',fv('r-rate-num')+'% p.a.'],['Loan term',fv('r-term-num')+' years'],['Repayments',segT('r-freq')],['Type',segT('r-type')]],
    borrow:()=>[['Applicants',segT('b-apps')],['Dependants',fv('b-deps')],['Monthly living expenses',mny(fv('b-expenses'))],['Other monthly debts',mny(fv('b-debts'))],['Credit card limits',mny(fv('b-cards'))],['Assessment rate',fv('b-rate-num')+'% p.a.'],['Loan term',fv('b-term-num')+' years']],
    costs:()=>[['Property value',mny(fv('c-price-num'))],['State / territory',selT('c-state')],['Purpose',segT('c-buyer')],['Property type',selT('c-type')],['First home buyer',segT('c-fhb')],['Foreign buyer',segT('c-foreign')]],
    extra:()=>[['Loan amount',mny(fv('e-amount-num'))],['Interest rate',fv('e-rate-num')+'% p.a.'],['Loan term',fv('e-term-num')+' years'],['Extra repayment',mny(fv('e-extra-num'))+' '+segT('e-freq').toLowerCase()]],
    offset:()=>[['Loan amount',mny(fv('o-amount-num'))],['Interest rate',fv('o-rate-num')+'% p.a.'],['Loan term',fv('o-term-num')+' years'],['Offset balance',mny(fv('o-balance-num'))],['Added each month',mny(fv('o-monthly-num'))]],
    deposit:()=>[['Property price',mny(fv('d-price-num'))],['Deposit target',fv('d-pct-num')+'%'],['Include stamp duty in goal',segT('d-costs')],['Current savings',mny(fv('d-savings'))],['Saved per month',mny(fv('d-monthly'))],['Savings rate',fv('d-srate-num')+'% p.a.']],
    compare:()=>[['Loan A',mny(fv('cmp-a-amt'))+' @ '+fv('cmp-a-rate')+'% / '+fv('cmp-a-term')+' yrs'],['Loan B',mny(fv('cmp-b-amt'))+' @ '+fv('cmp-b-rate')+'% / '+fv('cmp-b-term')+' yrs']]
  };
  function panelKey(card){ const p=card.closest('.panel'); return p? p.id.replace('panel-','') : ''; }
  function inputsFor(key){ try{ return (INPUTS[key]?INPUTS[key]():[]).map(r=>({k:r[0],v:(r[1]||'').trim()})).filter(r=>r.v && r.v!=='% p.a.' && r.v!=='years' && r.v!=='@ % / yrs'); }catch(e){ return []; } }

  function serialize(card){
    const title=((card.querySelector('h2')||{}).textContent||'Your results').trim();
    const rows=[];
    const hl=card.querySelector('.hero .label'), hf=card.querySelector('.hero .figure');
    if(hl&&hf) rows.push({k:hl.textContent.trim(), v:hf.textContent.trim()});
    card.querySelectorAll('.line').forEach(l=>{ if(l.offsetParent===null) return; const k=l.querySelector('.k'), v=l.querySelector('.v'); if(k&&v) rows.push({k:k.textContent.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(), v:v.textContent.trim()}); });
    return {title:title, inputs:inputsFor(panelKey(card)), rows:rows};
  }
  function buildSummary(name,data){
    const esc=s=>String(s==null?'':s).replace(/[&<>]/g,c=>({'&':'&','<':'<','>':'>'}[c]));
    function sec(label,list){
      if(!list||!list.length) return '';
      const tr=list.map(r=>'<tr><td style="padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #eee;color:#48535f">'+esc(r.k)+'</td><td style="padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #eee;text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:#16201a">'+esc(r.v)+'</td></tr>').join('');
      return '<div style="font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#5f8a7c;font-weight:700;margin:18px 0 6px">'+esc(label)+'</div><table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:14px">'+tr+'</table>';
    }
    return '<!doctype html><meta charset="utf-8"><title>'+esc(data.title)+' — brokerAPP</title>'
      +'<div style="max-width:540px;margin:28px auto;border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #e7e2d8;font-family:-apple-system,Segoe UI,Inter,sans-serif">'
      +'<div style="background:linear-gradient(165deg,#1f3d35,#15302a);color:#fff;padding:24px 26px"><div style="font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#9fc0b6">brokerAPP & Mortgages</div><div style="font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:25px;margin-top:5px">'+esc(data.title)+'</div></div>'
      +'<div style="padding:22px 26px;color:#1b2430;background:#fff"><p style="margin:0 0 4px">Hi '+esc(name||'there')+', here are the figures from your calculation:</p>'
      +sec('Your details',data.inputs)+sec('Results',data.rows)
      +'<p style="color:#6b7480;font-size:11.5px;margin:18px 0 0;line-height:1.5">Indicative estimate only — not financial or credit advice. Figures depend on your circumstances and lender. Speak with a licensed mortgage broker before making decisions.</p></div></div>';
  }
  function download(name,data){
    const blob=new Blob([buildSummary(name,data)],{type:'text/html'});
    const a=document.createElement('a'); a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob); a.download='brokerapp-results.html';
    document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); a.remove(); setTimeout(()=>URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href),2000);
  }

  const footers=[];
  function renderAll(){ footers.forEach(f=>f.render()); }
  function attach(card){
    const wrap=document.createElement('div'); wrap.className='lead-capture'; card.appendChild(wrap);
    const getData=()=>serialize(card);
    let mode='idle';
    function send(name,email){
      const d=getData();
      sessionSet(name,email);
      leadAdd({t:now(), calc:d.title, name:maskName(name), email:maskEmail(email), headline:(d.rows[0]||{}).v||'', inputs:d.inputs, outputs:d.rows});
      try{ window.lpResults && window.lpResults(name,email,d); }catch(e){}
      mode='idle'; renderAll();
      wrap.innerHTML='<div class="lc-done">✓ Sent to <b>'+maskEmail(email)+'</b>. <button class="lc-link lc-dl">Download a copy</button><br><span class="lc-demo">Demo — no email is actually sent. The live version emails the full result and records the lead for your broker.</span></div>';
      wrap.querySelector('.lc-dl').onclick=()=>download(name,d);
    }
    function render(){
      const s=sessionGet();
      if(s){
        const mins=Math.max(1,Math.ceil((s.expires-now())/60000));
        wrap.innerHTML='<div class="lc-row"><span class="lc-si">✓ Signed in as <b>'+(s.name||'you')+'</b> · '+mins+' min left</span><span class="lc-actions"><button class="lc-btn lc-send">✉ Email me these results</button><button class="lc-link lc-out">Sign out</button></span></div>';
        wrap.querySelector('.lc-send').onclick=()=>send(s.name,s.email);
        wrap.querySelector('.lc-out').onclick=()=>{ sessionClear(); mode='idle'; renderAll(); };
      } else if(mode==='form'){
        wrap.innerHTML='<div class="lc-form-h">✉ Email me these results</div>'
          +'<div class="lc-fields"><input class="lc-name" type="text" placeholder="First name" autocomplete="given-name"><input class="lc-email" type="email" placeholder="Email address" autocomplete="email"></div>'
          +'<label class="lc-consent"><input type="checkbox" class="lc-ok"> I agree to be contacted about my enquiry.</label>'
          +'<div class="lc-actions"><button class="lc-btn lc-go">Send my results</button><button class="lc-link lc-cancel">Cancel</button></div><div class="lc-err" hidden></div>';
        const err=wrap.querySelector('.lc-err');
        wrap.querySelector('.lc-go').onclick=()=>{
          const n=wrap.querySelector('.lc-name').value.trim(), e=wrap.querySelector('.lc-email').value.trim(), ok=wrap.querySelector('.lc-ok').checked;
          if(!validEmail(e)){ err.textContent='Please enter a valid email address.'; err.hidden=false; return; }
          if(!ok){ err.textContent='Please tick the box so we can send your results.'; err.hidden=false; return; }
          send(n,e);
        };
        wrap.querySelector('.lc-cancel').onclick=()=>{ mode='idle'; render(); };
      } else {
        wrap.innerHTML='<button class="lc-btn lc-open">✉ Email me these results</button>';
        wrap.querySelector('.lc-open').onclick=()=>{ mode='form'; render(); };
      }
    }
    footers.push({render:render}); render();
  }
  document.querySelectorAll('.card.result').forEach(attach);
  setInterval(()=>{ if(sessionGet()) renderAll(); }, 30000);
  window.__demoLeads={ get:()=>{ try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(LKEY)||'[]');}catch(e){return [];} }, clear:()=>{ try{localStorage.removeItem(LKEY);}catch(e){} } };
})();

/* ================= SITE CONFIG: logo, contact/brokers, landing pages ================= */
(function(){
  const $=id=>document.getElementById(id);
  function esc(s){ return String(s==null?'':s).replace(/[&<>"]/g,c=>({'&':'&','<':'<','>':'>','"':'"'}[c])); }
  function maskEmail(e){ const p=(e||'').split('@'); if(p.length<2) return '***'; const d=p[1].split('.'); return p[0].slice(0,1)+'***@'+d[0].slice(0,1)+'***'+(d.length>1?'.'+d[d.length-1]:''); }
  function maskName(n){ n=(n||'').trim(); return n?n.slice(0,1)+'***':'Anon'; }
  function leadAdd(rec){ try{ const a=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('brokerapp_demo_leads')||'[]'); a.unshift(rec); localStorage.setItem('brokerapp_demo_leads',JSON.stringify(a.slice(0,200))); }catch(e){} }
  function md(t){
    return esc(t)
      .replace(/^### (.*)$/gm,'<h3>$1</h3>').replace(/^## (.*)$/gm,'<h2>$1</h2>').replace(/^# (.*)$/gm,'<h2>$1</h2>')
      .replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g,'<strong>$1</strong>')
      .replace(/^- (.*)$/gm,'<li>$1</li>').replace(/(<li>[\s\S]*?<\/li>)/g,'<ul>$1</ul>')
      .split(/\n{2,}/).map(b=>/^\s*<(h\d|ul|li)/.test(b)?b:'<p>'+b.replace(/\n/g,'<br>')+'</p>').join('');
  }
  const IS_DEMO = !!(document.getElementById('demo-bar')||document.getElementById('admin-view'));
  const DEFAULT_CFG = {
    logo:{ text:'brokerAPP', tagline:'Plan with confidence', subtext:'Run the numbers on repayments, borrowing power and upfront costs before you talk to a broker. Estimates update as you go.', imageUrl:'', showLogo:true, showTagline:true, showSubtext:true },
    contact:{ show:true, intro:'Speak with one of our brokers \u2014 we\u2019ll get back to you quickly.', brokers:[
      { id:'rob', name:'Rob Sample', title:'Principal Mortgage Broker', phone:'02 6100 0000', email:'rob@brokerapp.com.au', address:'Level 1, 10 Example St, Canberra ACT 2600', bio:'With over 15 years helping Canberra families into the right loan, Rob takes the stress out of finance \u2014 from first home buyers to seasoned investors.', special:'First-home-buyer specialist \u00b7 Investment lending \u00b7 Refinancing', photo:'' }
    ] },
    pages:[ { id:'home-canberra', meta:'Compare home loan repayments and borrowing power with a local Canberra broker.', title:'Home Loans in Canberra', slug:'home-loans-canberra', h1:'Home loans, made simple in Canberra', body:'Looking for a home loan in Canberra? We help local buyers compare repayments, work out borrowing power and understand upfront costs \u2014 then match them with a loan that fits.\n\n## Why work with a local broker\n- We know the Canberra market and the lenders that suit it\n- Free, no-obligation appointments that fit around you\n- One point of contact from application to settlement\n\n## Start with the numbers\nUse the calculators on this site to estimate your repayments and borrowing power, then book a chat to turn those numbers into a plan.', menu:'footer', status:'published' } ]
  };

  let CFG=null, activeBroker=null;

  function applyHeader(L){
    L=L||{}; const eye=$('hdr-eyebrow'), logo=$('hdr-logo'), title=$('hdr-title'), sub=$('hdr-sub');
    if(!eye) return;
    if(L.showTagline===false){ eye.style.display='none'; } else { eye.style.display=''; if(L.tagline) eye.textContent=L.tagline; }
    if(L.showLogo===false){ if(logo) logo.style.display='none'; if(title) title.style.display='none'; }
    else if(L.imageUrl){ if(logo){ logo.src=L.imageUrl; logo.style.display=''; } if(title) title.style.display='none'; }
    else { if(logo) logo.style.display='none'; if(title){ title.style.display=''; if(L.text) title.textContent=L.text; } }
    if(L.showSubtext===false){ sub.style.display='none'; } else { sub.style.display=''; if(L.subtext) sub.textContent=L.subtext; }
  }

  function avatar(b,cls){ return b.photo?'<img class="'+cls+'" src="'+esc(b.photo)+'" alt="">':'<div class="'+cls+'"></div>'; }
  function form(b){
    return '<div class="cform"><h3>Enquire'+(b?' with '+esc(b.name):'')+'</h3><p class="req">Name, phone and email are required.</p>'
      +'<label>Name *</label><input class="cf-name" type="text">'
      +'<label>Phone *</label><input class="cf-phone" type="tel">'
      +'<label>Email *</label><input class="cf-email" type="email">'
      +'<label>Message</label><textarea class="cf-msg" rows="3"></textarea>'
      +'<div class="cf-err"></div><button class="cf-btn" type="button">Send enquiry</button>'
      +'<div class="cf-ok">\u2713 Thanks \u2014 your enquiry has been sent. (Demo: captured into Leads; no email is actually sent.)</div></div>';
  }
  function wireForm(root,b){
    const btn=root.querySelector('.cf-btn'); if(!btn) return;
    btn.onclick=function(){
      const n=root.querySelector('.cf-name').value.trim(), ph=root.querySelector('.cf-phone').value.trim(), em=root.querySelector('.cf-email').value.trim(), msg=root.querySelector('.cf-msg').value.trim(), err=root.querySelector('.cf-err');
      if(!n||!ph||!em){ err.textContent='Please fill in name, phone and email.'; return; }
      if(!/^[^@\s]+@[^@\s]+\.[^@\s]+$/.test(em)){ err.textContent='Please enter a valid email address.'; return; }
      err.textContent='';
      leadAdd({t:Date.now(), calc:'Contact enquiry', name:maskName(n), email:maskEmail(em), headline:(b?'For '+b.name:'General enquiry'), inputs:{Phone:ph, Message:msg||'\u2014'}, outputs:[]});
      try{ window.lpEnquiry && window.lpEnquiry(n,ph,em,msg,b); }catch(e){}
      root.querySelector('.cf-ok').style.display='block';
      ['cf-name','cf-phone','cf-email','cf-msg'].forEach(c=>{ const el=root.querySelector('.'+c); if(el) el.value=''; });
    };
  }
  function bioHtml(b){
    const meta=[]; if(b.phone)meta.push('<div class="bm"><b>Phone</b><span>'+esc(b.phone)+'</span></div>'); if(b.email)meta.push('<div class="bm"><b>Email</b><span>'+esc(b.email)+'</span></div>'); if(b.address)meta.push('<div class="bm"><b>Office</b><span>'+esc(b.address)+'</span></div>');
    return '<div class="bio"><div><div class="bio-head">'+avatar(b,'bio-av')+'<div><div class="bio-nm">'+esc(b.name)+'</div><div class="bio-ti">'+esc(b.title||'')+'</div></div></div>'
      +'<div class="bio-body"><p>'+esc(b.bio||'').replace(/\n+/g,'</p><p>')+'</p></div>'
      +(meta.length?'<div class="bio-meta">'+meta.join('')+'</div>':'')
      +(b.special?'<div class="bio-special">'+esc(b.special)+'</div>':'')+'</div>'+form(b)+'</div>';
  }
  function renderContact(C){
    const wrap=$('ct-wrap'); if(!wrap) return;
    const brokers=(C&&C.brokers)||[];
    const intro = C&&C.intro ? '<p class="ct-intro">'+esc(C.intro)+'</p>' : '';
    if(activeBroker && brokers.length>1){
      const b=brokers.find(x=>x.id===activeBroker)||brokers[0];
      wrap.innerHTML='<button class="bio-back" type="button">\u2039 All brokers</button>'+bioHtml(b);
      wrap.querySelector('.bio-back').onclick=()=>{ activeBroker=null; renderContact(C); window.scrollTo(0,0); };
      wireForm(wrap,b);
    } else if(brokers.length>1){
      wrap.innerHTML=intro+'<div class="ct-team">'+brokers.map(b=>'<button class="ct-pick" type="button" data-b="'+b.id+'">'+avatar(b,'ct-av')+'<div class="ct-nm">'+esc(b.name)+'</div><div class="ct-ti">'+esc(b.title||'')+'</div>'+(b.special?'<div class="ct-sp">'+esc(b.special)+'</div>':'')+'</button>').join('')+'</div>';
      wrap.querySelectorAll('.ct-pick').forEach(p=>p.onclick=()=>{ activeBroker=p.dataset.b; renderContact(C); window.scrollTo(0,0); });
    } else if(brokers.length===1){
      wrap.innerHTML=intro+bioHtml(brokers[0]); wireForm(wrap,brokers[0]);
    } else { wrap.innerHTML=intro+form(null); wireForm(wrap,null); }
  }

  function showPage(p, fromTab){
    if(!p) return;
    document.querySelectorAll('.panel').forEach(x=>{x.hidden=true;x.classList.remove('active');});
    if(!fromTab) document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t=>t.setAttribute('aria-selected','false'));
    $('lpv-body').innerHTML=(p.h1?'<h1>'+esc(p.h1)+'</h1>':'')+md(p.body||'');
    const lp=$('panel-landing'); lp.hidden=false; lp.classList.add('active'); window.scrollTo(0,0);
  }
  function renderFooter(pages){
    const foot=$('site-foot'), inn=$('site-foot-in'); if(!foot) return;
    const links=(pages||[]).filter(p=>p.status==='published'&&p.menu==='footer');
    if(!links.length){ foot.hidden=true; inn.innerHTML=''; return; }
    foot.hidden=false; inn.innerHTML=links.map(p=>'<a data-pg="'+p.id+'">'+esc(p.title||'Page')+'</a>').join('');
    inn.querySelectorAll('[data-pg]').forEach(a=>a.onclick=()=>showPage(links.find(x=>x.id===a.dataset.pg)));
  }
  function renderTopLinks(pages){
    const row=document.querySelector('.tabs'); if(!row) return;
    row.querySelectorAll('.tab-page').forEach(t=>t.remove());
    const pub=(pages||[]).filter(p=>p.status==='published'&&p.menu==='top'), feat=$('tab-features');
    if(!window.__pageTabPatch){ window.__pageTabPatch=true; row.querySelectorAll('.tab:not(.tab-page)').forEach(t=>t.addEventListener('click',()=>{ document.querySelectorAll('.tab-page').forEach(x=>x.setAttribute('aria-selected','false')); })); }
    pub.forEach(p=>{ const b=document.createElement('button'); b.className='tab tab-page'; b.type='button'; b.setAttribute('role','tab'); b.setAttribute('aria-selected','false'); b.textContent=p.title||'Page';
      b.onclick=()=>{ document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t=>t.setAttribute('aria-selected','false')); b.setAttribute('aria-selected','true'); showPage(p,true); };
      row.insertBefore(b, feat); });
  }

  window.__applyConfig=function(cfg){
    cfg=cfg||{};
    if(IS_DEMO){ cfg={ logo:cfg.logo||DEFAULT_CFG.logo, contact:(cfg.contact&&cfg.contact.brokers&&cfg.contact.brokers.length)?cfg.contact:DEFAULT_CFG.contact, pages:(cfg.pages&&cfg.pages.length)?cfg.pages:DEFAULT_CFG.pages }; }
    CFG=cfg; applyHeader(cfg.logo);
    const C=cfg.contact||{brokers:[]}, tab=$('tab-contact');
    const showCt = C.show!==false && C.brokers && C.brokers.length;
    if(tab) tab.hidden=!showCt;
    if(showCt) renderContact(C); else { activeBroker=null; }
    renderFooter(cfg.pages); renderTopLinks(cfg.pages);
  };

  try{
    let cfg=window.BROKERAPP_RATES||null;
    const raw=localStorage.getItem('brokerapp_demo_rates_v1');
    if(raw){ const o=JSON.parse(raw); if(o&&o.rates&&o.savedAt&&Date.now()-o.savedAt<=864e5) cfg=o.rates; }
    if(cfg||IS_DEMO) window.__applyConfig(cfg||{});
  }catch(e){}
})();
</script>
<script>
/* leadpages: wire brokerAPP captures into the platform pipeline (/api/leads, /api/events) */
(function(){
  var CFG = window.BROKERAPP_CONFIG || {};
  var SITE = CFG.business || (CFG.logo && CFG.logo.text) || 'brokerAPP';
  function post(url, body){
    try { fetch(url, {method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:JSON.stringify(body), keepalive:true}).catch(function(){}); } catch(e){}
  }
  window.lpTrack = function(event, props){ post('/api/events', {site:SITE, event:event, props:props||{}}); };
  window.lpLead  = function(p){ post('/api/leads', Object.assign({site:SITE, kind:'broker'}, p)); };
  window.lpEnquiry = function(n, ph, em, msg, b){
    window.lpLead({name:n, phone:ph, email:em, details:{source:'enquiry', message:msg||'', broker:(b?b.name:null)}});
    window.lpTrack('lead_submit', {source:'enquiry'});
  };
  window.lpResults = function(name, email, d){
    window.lpLead({name:name, email:email, details:{source:'email_results', calc:(d&&d.title)||'', headline:(d&&d.rows&&d.rows[0]&&d.rows[0].v)||'', inputs:(d&&d.inputs)||[], outputs:(d&&d.rows)||[]}});
    window.lpTrack('lead_submit', {source:'email_results', calc:(d&&d.title)||''});
  };
  function pv(){ window.lpTrack('page_view', {slug:CFG.slug||'', template:'broker-app'}); }
  if(document.readyState==='loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', pv); else pv();
})();
</script>
